title: Public GitHub work and infrastructure labs

items.title: Terraform Jenkins on DigitalOcean
items.summary: Infrastructure as Code project that provisions a Jenkins server on DigitalOcean with persistent storage, Nginx, DNS, firewall rules, Docker, and HTTPS.
items.stack: Terraform, Jenkins, Docker, Nginx, Linux, DigitalOcean

items.title: Azure VM Terraform + LocalStack
items.summary: Single-server Azure environment with networking, DNS, Docker, LocalStack, Nginx, and custom domains for repeatable cloud-emulation experiments.
items.stack: Terraform, Azure, LocalStack, Docker, Nginx, DNS

items.title: LocalStack AWS Automation Lab
items.summary: Jenkins-based automation lab that deploys AWS-like resources into LocalStack with Terraform or AWS CLI and supports reusable deployment pipelines.
items.stack: Jenkins, Terraform, AWS CLI, LocalStack, Azure Blob State, Shell Automation

items.title: Spring Boot Multi-App Platform
items.summary: Spring Boot platform that serves multiple web applications from one backend, organizing routing, templates, static assets, and shared presentation logic.
items.stack: Java, Spring Boot, Thymeleaf, HTML, CSS, Web Routing
